arts.sum: Ange on if he was disappointed not to win after our second half display... We stayed in control, we scored a good equaliser, we made them work hard in the first half so we knew in the second half, with our ability to break teams open, we would put them under pressure.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou’s verdict: “I couldn’t have asked for more”
arts.sum: Speaking on our Review Show, Ange reflected: “I couldn’t ask more from the boys in terms of performance. If we repeat that performance next week, we’ll give ourselves a great chance.
